testcase.name: Generate project report
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Generate project report &amp#27;[90m# features/project_planning.feature:32&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe system has a developer with initials &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"huba"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.planner.steps.StepDefinitions.theSystemHasADeveloperWithInitials(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32ma project with name &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"WebShop"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m exists&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.planner.steps.StepDefinitions.aProjectWithNameExists(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe project has an activity &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Requirements"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m with a budget of &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m100.0&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m hours&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.planner.steps.StepDefinitions.theProjectHasAnActivityWithBudget(java.lang.String,double)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mdeveloper &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"huba"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m has registered &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m30.0&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m hours on activity &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Requirements"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.planner.steps.StepDefinitions.developerHasRegisteredHoursOnActivity(java.lang.String,double,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32ma report is generated for the project&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.planner.steps.StepDefinitions.aReportIsGeneratedForTheProject()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe report shows &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m100.0&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m budgeted hours and &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m30.0&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m registered hours for &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Requirements"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.planner.steps.StepDefinitions.theReportShowsBudgetedAndRegisteredHours(double,double,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Cannot set an invalid deadline week
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Cannot set an invalid deadline week &amp#27;[90m# features/project_planning.feature:64&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe system has a developer with initials &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"huba"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.planner.steps.StepDefinitions.theSystemHasADeveloperWithInitials(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32ma project with name &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"WebShop"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m exists&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.planner.steps.StepDefinitions.aProjectWithNameExists(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32ma deadline is set to week &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m99&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m year &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m2026&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m for the project&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.planner.steps.StepDefinitions.aDeadlineIsSetForTheProject(int,int)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32man error is raised with message &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Deadline week must be between 1 and 53"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.planner.steps.StepDefinitions.anErrorIsRaisedWithMessage(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: View project progress with registered hours
testcase.system-out: Scenario: View project progress with registered hours &amp#27;[90m# features/project_planning.feature:71&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe system has a developer with initials &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"huba"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.planner.steps.StepDefinitions.theSystemHasADeveloperWithInitials(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32ma project with name &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"WebShop"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m exists&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.planner.steps.StepDefinitions.aProjectWithNameExists(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe project has an activity &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Design"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m with a budget of &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m50.0&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m hours&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.planner.steps.StepDefinitions.theProjectHasAnActivityWithBudget(java.lang.String,double)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mdeveloper &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"huba"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m has registered &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m25.0&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m hours on activity &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Design"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.planner.steps.StepDefinitions.developerHasRegisteredHoursOnActivity(java.lang.String,double,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe project progress is calculated&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.planner.steps.StepDefinitions.theProjectProgressIsCalculated()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe progress is &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m50.0&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m percent&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.planner.steps.StepDefinitions.theProgressIs(double)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Cannot assign a non-existent developer to an activity
